Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests.extension

package org.eventb.core.ast.tests.extension
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.eventb.core.ast.tests
     
    org.eventb.core.ast.tests.datatype
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Extensions
    This class provides a formula factory to be used for testing extension translations.
    Extensions.AbstractExtension
     
    Extensions.AbstractRealExtension
    Common abstraction for extensions about real numbers.
    Extensions.And
     
    Extensions.Belongs
     
    Extensions.CProd
    An extension representing a Cartesian product, simulating an axiomatic type defined by the Theory plug-in.
    Extensions.Empty
     
    Extensions.FSet
    An extension representing finite sets, simulating an axiomatic type defined by the Theory plug-in.
    Extensions.Real
    An extension representing the set of all real numbers, simulating an axiomatic type defined by the Theory plug-in.
    Extensions.RealEmpty
    An extension representing the empty set of real numbers, simulating an axiomatic operator defined by the Theory plug-in whose type is not directly an axiomatic type.
    Extensions.RealPlus
    An extension representing addition on real numbers, simulating an axiomatic operator defined by the Theory plug-in.
    Extensions.RealZero
    An extension representing the real number zero, simulating an axiomatic atomic operator defined by the Theory plug-in.
    Extensions.Union2
     
    Extensions.Union3
     
    TestExtensionSignature
    Unit tests for the ExtensionSignature class.
    TestExtensionTranslation
    Unit tests for extension translation provided by ExtensionTranslation .
    TestExtensionTranslation.ExtensionTranslationErrors
     
    TestTranslationFactory
    Unit tests about the computation of the target factory by ExtensionTranslation.
